name: obsidian-ai-chat
description: Obsidian plugin for chatting with LLMs

scripts.test: npx ts-node --esm src/__tests__/DiffService.test.ts && npx ts-node --esm src/__tests__/mcp.test.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p "${OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_PATH:?Set OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_PATH}" && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "$OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_PATH"
